description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build: Linux that runs on push to master branch in src/ directory and on pull requests to master in src/ directory. The workflow also allows manual dispatch. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy for debug and release modes. For each mode, check out omnetpp/omnetpp repository into omnetpp directory at omnetpp-6.x ref and inet into root directory, set up ccache, and run a script to install packages and build binaries using build-omnetpp.sh and build-inet.sh.
